text.title: autonomous-agents Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for autonomous-agents as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM tool-call JSON is not always valid; parsing fails and the agent crashes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always parse with try/except and return structured error back to the agent. "Observation: None" is invisible to the LLM — always return a non-empty string ("Success: no output" is better than empty). ReAct agents often confuse "what I should do" with "what I just did" when the observation is similar to a prior step; include step counters in observations.
